Pant.su 2010-2011 collection
description:
This torrent contains almost everything that was released on pant.su after batch torrent v4.0 (12 February 2010) and the end of January 2012. All categories and posts presented on the site are included.  
Files are sorted by year, month and day that they were posted on pant.su. Magazines like Comic LO, Comic RiN and others have been moved to the 'archive' directory, like in the previous batch.  
  
Almost all are original files posted by Len. Some missed files was taken from other sources in the best available quality (mostly C78 doujins). Some mangas have since been fully translated since they were posted, these were added instead.  
  
If you're looking for older releases, the previous batch torrent can be found there : <http://pant.su/index.php/batch-torrent/>
